commands.review_summary:
The PR adds provider-scoped cooldown cleanup after direct/plugin auth refreshes, changes billing fallback probing to account for later auth availability, and adds focused auth/fallback regression tests.

PR surface: Source +199, Tests +398. Total +597 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main suppresses the early billing probe whenever any fallback is configured, even when later candidates share the unavailable auth path. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove the stale post-lock save, but maintainers still need to coordinate the auth recovery policy with the related open PR before merge.
